title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 52: Master Flux Kontext – Inpainting, Editing & Character Consistency
description:
Unlock the full potential of Flux Kontext, a powerful and free model for ComfyUI, in this comprehensive episode. Learn how to edit images, remove or replace items, maintain character consistency, and perform style transformations with high precision. Whether you’re upgrading from Flux or exploring new editing techniques, this tutorial is packed with practical workflows, pro tips, and downloadable examples to help you get started quickly.

✅ Topics Covered:

- How to install and run Flux Kontext in ComfyUI
- Efficient workflows for image generation, upscaling, and editing
- Precise inpainting techniques for background and object removal
- Creating consistent characters across different images
- Using style reference images and Loras to transform your visuals
- Background replacement, text changes, and multi-character compositions
- Running ComfyUI + Kontext in the cloud

📁 All workflows shown in the video are free to download from our Discord server
First use this link to join if you di
